title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Strong thunderstorms are expected for Germany, Czech Republic and Poland on june 29th 2026, with the highest risk being MDRT

A significant cold front will move through the region after a historic European heatwave, initiating strong thunderstorms

MDRT
S Germany, W/C Czechia & SW Poland
Scattered strong thunderstorms are expected, with large hail, strong wind gusts and heavy rain.

The strongest thunderstorms should come towards the night into the early morning of the 30th. MLCAPE will be at some places up to 2375 j/kg. A slight threat of weaker tornadoes is also present, as moderate-strong lls (20m/s) will exist over Bohemia, and LCL will be at around 500m and lower.

The scattered supercells could later merge into and MCS that would carry severe wind gusts threat.

ENHD
Germany, Poland & Czechia
Scattered moderate, some even strong thunderstorms are expected, their biggest threats will be large hail, moderate wind gusts and the biggest threat local floodings as HP thunderstorms are expected.
